title: Anthropic opens Seoul office and announces new partnerships across the Korean AI ecosystem
gist: Anthropic opened a Seoul office and announced enterprise, startup, government and research partnerships across Korea, including Claude Code deployments at NAVER and Nexon, rollouts at LG CNS, Hanwha Solutions and Samsung SDS, and an AI-safety MOU with Korea's Ministry of Science and ICT. Korea ranks among the top dozen countries globally for Claude.ai use.

insights.claim: NAVER, a leading Asian cloud and AI company, has deployed Claude Code across its entire engineering organization, with thousands of NAVER engineers now using it to diversify coding tools and maximize productivity.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
insights.so_what: Org-wide Claude Code adoption at a major Asian tech firm is a concrete enterprise-revenue and coding-agent traction signal for Anthropic.
insights.quote: NAVER, a leader in cloud and AI innovation in Asia, has recently deployed Claude Code across its entire engineering organization.
insights.locator: Some of the deepest adoption is happening among developers

insights.claim: At global online game company Nexon, engineering teams use Claude Code to write, review and ship code for live-service games played by millions.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
insights.so_what: Production-game-code use of Claude Code shows penetration into mission-critical software workflows beyond experimentation.
insights.locator: At global online game company Nexon

insights.claim: LG CNS is rolling out Claude to thousands of employees and will deploy Claude across LG Group, Hanwha Solutions is bringing Claude to global employees via AWS Bedrock under data-residency requirements, and Samsung SDS is deploying Claude (including Claude Cowork and Claude Code) across Samsung Electronics.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
insights.so_what: Deployments across Korea's largest conglomerates signal large-enterprise seat expansion and an AWS Bedrock distribution channel for Anthropic.
insights.locator: Korea's largest business groups are also deploying Claude

insights.claim: Channel Corp uses Claude to power Channel Talk, a customer AI platform used by over 230,000 companies across Korea, Japan and the United States to resolve inquiries and analyze service and sales data.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
insights.so_what: Claude embedded in a product reaching 230,000+ companies shows scaled downstream distribution via Korean SaaS startups.
insights.quote: used by over 230,000 companies across Korea, Japan, and the United States
insights.locator: And startups are building Claude directly into their products

insights.claim: Anthropic signed an MOU with Korea's Ministry of Science and ICT to support safe AI adoption across the public sector, including evaluating model safety in Korean with the Korea AI Safety Institute and exchanging information on AI-enabled cyber threats.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
entities: Korea Ministry of Science and ICT
insights.so_what: A government AI-safety MOU positions Anthropic for Korean public-sector deals and regulatory goodwill amid geopolitically sensitive AI markets.

insights.claim: Anthropic will provide Claude access to up to 60 researchers affiliated with the National AI Research Lab consortium spanning KAIST, Korea University, Yonsei University and POSTECH, supporting AI safety, evaluation, alignment and robustness research.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
insights.so_what: Academic partnerships build a talent and research pipeline that can deepen Anthropic's local ecosystem entrenchment.
insights.locator: Our work in Korea also reaches beyond the private sector

insights.claim: According to Anthropic's Economic Index, Korea is among the top dozen countries in the world for Claude.ai use, concentrated in technical and creative work, and home to one of Anthropic's most active developer communities.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
insights.so_what: Top-dozen global usage ranking quantifies Korea as a key growth market, justifying the local office and partnership investment.
insights.quote: Korea is among the top dozen countries in the world for Claude.ai use
insights.locator: According to our latest Economic Index

insights.claim: Anthropic's Seoul office is led by KiYoung Choi, Representative Director of Korea, who brings three decades of experience leading technology businesses across Korea, and is now open and hiring across a range of roles.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
insights.so_what: A senior local leader and active hiring signal a sustained, long-term commitment to the Korean market.

insights.claim: Anthropic is supporting Korean founders through Claude for Startups (now live in Korea), Claude Meetups drawing hundreds of developers since September 2025, a Claude Build Day co-hosted with BASS Ventures, and a Push to Prod hackathon with Replit, Korea Investment Partners and Korea Investment Accelerator.
insights.speaker: @AnthropicAI
insights.so_what: Startup-ecosystem programs seed bottoms-up Claude adoption and lock-in among Korea's next generation of builders.

top_entities: Korea Ministry of Science and ICT
